head.hi: Memorandum of Conversation, by the Secretary of State

div.p: Dr. Troncoso de la Concha, Special Envoy of the Dominican Republic to the United States in connection with the settlement of the Haitian-Dominican controversy, in company with the Dominican Minister, came in to pay his respects and to deliver a very cordial message from President Trujillo of greeting and good will, and of cooperation in every way to promote Pan Americanism and peace. I thanked him in appropriate terms and reciprocated the sentiments expressed.
